name: Water animated 4f
description: Looping 4-frame water tile, 16x16. Frames cycle horizontally-shifting wave pattern.
rule_summary: Each frame shifts the wave pattern by 4px. Use 2 shades of water + 1 highlight. Frame durations 200ms each = 800ms loop.
source: Slynyrd Pixelblog #2 - Water + general arcade water tiles

layers.name: water_base
layers.purpose: Full 16x16 base water color across all 4 frames.

layers.name: wave
layers.purpose: Wave pattern. Paint frame 1 then shift +4px x for frames 2/3/4.

layers.name: highlight
layers.purpose: Sparse 1px highlights on wave crests, shifting with wave.
